name: mailwatch
description: Watch email inboxes and process messages with rules — keyword, regex, attachment, or AI matching with actions like notify, CRM update, calendar import, and draft replies. Send replies via AgentMail with auto-send rules or WhatsApp approval.
author: CupBots
intent: Monitor email inboxes, forward matching emails to WhatsApp, and send replies via AgentMail
config: The mailbox email address to watch
WhatsApp JID to send notifications to
API key from agentmail.to — enables outbound email sending
AgentMail inbox ID for outbound emails
Sender display name, e.g. ClientName Assistant
Fallback reply-to for new emails (replies auto-use the inbound address)

marketplace.tagline: Turn your inbox into an automation engine
marketplace.long_description: Watch your email inbox and process messages automatically based on rules you define. Match emails by keyword, regex, attachment type, or AI classification. Actions include WhatsApp notifications, CRM updates, calendar imports, and AI-drafted replies with auto-send or WhatsApp approval via AgentMail. Set up rules like 'any email from @acme.com with an invoice attachment -> notify me' and let the bot handle the rest.
